steps.title: Convert the arc fraction
steps.content:
The $45^\circ$ arc is the same fraction of the circle as $45^\circ$ is of $360^\circ$.
$$\frac{45}{360}=\frac{1}{8}$$

steps.title: Scale to the full circumference
steps.content: The arc length $4$ inches is $\frac{1}{8}$ of the circumference, so the full circumference must be $8$ times the arc length. $$4=\frac{1}{8}C$$ $$C=32$$ The answer is D.
